title: The Universal Self-Introduction Script
description: A simple English text to practice speaking about yourself. It helps you learn common sentence structures and use them in everyday conversations.

phrases.text: Hello. My name is Andrey.
Right now, I am focused on building a life that feels meaningful and balanced.
I work in a field that requires creativity and logical thinking.
I enjoy solving problems.
I like improving systems.
I’m interested in understanding how things work.
I always try to find better ways to do them.
At the moment, I am developing new skills.
I am also working on becoming more confident.
I try to improve a little every day.
Even small progress matters to me.
I believe consistency is more important than motivation.
In the past, I used to overthink my decisions.
I wanted everything to be perfect.
Because of that, I sometimes delayed action.
Later, I realized something important.
Waiting for the perfect moment often means missing opportunities.
Since then, I have started acting more decisively.
Outside of work, I value time with my family and close friends.
Spending time with them helps me recharge.
I also enjoy learning new things.
I read books.
I watch educational content.
Sometimes I practice new skills.
Learning keeps me curious and open-minded.
One of my goals is personal and professional growth.
I want to communicate clearly.
I want to think independently.
I want to take responsibility for my choices.
In the future, I plan to keep developing my skills.
I want to work on projects that create real value.
I don’t know exactly where I will be in five years.
But I am confident that steady effort will lead me in the right direction.
